description: AnythingLLM is the easiest to use, all-in-one AI application that can do RAG, AI Agents, and much more with no code or infrastructure headaches.

tips.before_install:
**Usage Tips**
AnythingLLM supports but does not directly provide various LLMs backends, you need to configure the backends you need yourself.
Please refer to the [official documentation](https://docs.anythingllm.com) for more information.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Latest upstream release v1.12.1 adds streamed document embedding status so workspace uploads report progress per document.
- Built-in Agent skill integrations were added for Gmail, Outlook, and Google Calendar.
- Other improvements include image lightbox support, Korean/Chinese/Japanese PDF generation support, better integration citations, and DDG default web search for agent skills.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Latest upstream release v1.12.1 adds streamed document embedding status so workspace uploads report progress per document.
- Built-in Agent skill integrations were added for Gmail, Outlook, and Google Calendar.
- Other improvements include image lightbox support, Korean/Chinese/Japanese PDF generation support, better integration citations, and DDG default web search for agent skills.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- L'ultima versione upstream v1.12.1 aggiunge lo stato di incorporamento dei documenti in streaming in modo che i caricamenti dell'area di lavoro riportino l'avanzamento per documento.
- Built-in Sono state aggiunte integrazioni delle competenze dell'agente per Gmail, Outlook e Google Calendar.
- Altri miglioramenti includono il supporto della lightbox delle immagini, il supporto della generazione di PDF coreano/cinese/giapponese, una migliore integrazione delle citazioni e la ricerca web predefinita DDG per le competenze degli agenti.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Siste oppstrømsutgivelse v1.12.1 legger til innbyggingsstatus for streamet dokument slik at arbeidsområdet laster opp rapportfremdrift per dokument.
- Built-in Agentferdighetsintegrasjoner ble lagt til for Gmail, Outlook og Google Kalender.
- Andre forbedringer inkluderer støtte for bildelysboks, støtte for koreansk/kinesisk/japansk PDF generasjon, bedre integrasjonssiteringer og DDG standard nettsøk for agentferdigheter.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- 上游最新版本 v1.12.1 增加了流式 document embedding 状态，workspace 上传文档时会按单个文档报告进度。
- 新增了内置 Agent skill 集成，支持 Gmail、Outlook 和 Google Calendar。
- 其他改进包括 image lightbox、韩文/中文/日文 PDF 生成支持、更好的集成引用，以及 agent skills 默认使用 DDG 网页搜索。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- upstream の最新リリース v1.12.1 は、workspace へのドキュメントアップロードで各ドキュメントの進行状況を報告する streamed document embedding status を追加します。
- Gmail、Outlook、Google Calendar 向けの組み込み Agent skill 連携が追加されました。
- その他、image lightbox、韓国語/中国語/日本語の PDF 生成サポート、連携引用の改善、agent skills の DDG デフォルト Web 検索が含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- upstream 최신 릴리스 v1.12.1은 workspace 문서 업로드 시 문서별 진행 상황을 보고하는 streamed document embedding status를 추가합니다.
- Gmail, Outlook, Google Calendar용 내장 Agent skill 통합이 추가되었습니다.
- 기타 개선 사항에는 image lightbox, 한국어/중국어/일본어 PDF 생성 지원, 더 나은 통합 인용, agent skills의 DDG 기본 웹 검색이 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- La derniere release upstream v1.12.1 ajoute l'etat de document embedding en streaming, avec une progression par document lors des uploads dans le workspace.
- Des integrations Agent skill integrees ont ete ajoutees pour Gmail, Outlook et Google Calendar.
- Les autres ameliorations incluent image lightbox, la prise en charge coreen/chinois/japonais pour la generation PDF, de meilleures citations d'integration et DDG comme recherche web par defaut pour les agent skills.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Das aktuelle upstream Release v1.12.1 ergaenzt gestreamte Document-Embedding-Statusmeldungen, sodass Workspace-Uploads den Fortschritt pro Dokument melden.
- Integrierte Agent-Skill-Integrationen fuer Gmail, Outlook und Google Calendar wurden hinzugefuegt.
- Weitere Verbesserungen umfassen Image Lightbox, Koreanisch/Chinesisch/Japanisch-Unterstuetzung fuer PDF-Erzeugung, bessere Integrationszitate und DDG als Standard-Websuche fuer Agent Skills.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Senaste uppströmsversionen v1.12.1 lägger till inbäddningsstatus för streamade dokument så att arbetsytan laddar upp rapportförlopp per dokument.
- Built-in Integreringar av agentfärdigheter har lagts till för Gmail, Outlook och Google Kalender.
- Andra förbättringar inkluderar stöd för bildljuslåda, stöd för generationens PDF koreanska/kinesiska/japanska, bättre integrationsreferenser och DDG standardwebbsökning för agentfärdigheter.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Η τελευταία ανοδική κυκλοφορία v1.12.1 προσθέτει κατάσταση ενσωμάτωσης εγγράφων ροής, ώστε οι μεταφορτώσεις του χώρου εργασίας να αναφέρουν την πρόοδο ανά έγγραφο.
- Built-in Προστέθηκαν ενσωματώσεις δεξιοτήτων Agent για το Gmail, το Outlook και το Ημερολόγιο Google.
- Άλλες βελτιώσεις περιλαμβάνουν υποστήριξη lightbox εικόνας, υποστήριξη γενιάς Κορεατικών/Κινεζικών/Ιαπωνικών PDF, καλύτερες αναφορές ενοποίησης και DDG προεπιλεγμένης αναζήτησης στον ιστό για δεξιότητες αντιπροσώπου.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- Najnovije uzvodno izdanje v1.12.1 dodaje status ugradnje strujanog dokumenta tako da prijenosi radnog prostora izvješćuju o napretku po dokumentu.
- Built-in Integracije vještina agenata dodane su za Gmail, Outlook i Google kalendar.
- Ostala poboljšanja uključuju podršku za okvir slike, podršku za generiranje korejskog/kineskog/japanskog PDF, bolje citate integracije i DDG zadano web pretraživanje za vještine agenata.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- A versão upstream mais recente v1.12.1 adiciona o estado de incorporação de documentos transmitidos para que o espaço de trabalho carregue o progresso do relatório por documento.
- Built-in Foram adicionadas integrações de competências do agente para o Gmail, Outlook e Google Calendar.
- Outras melhorias incluem suporte para lightbox de imagem, suporte para a geração PDF coreana/chinesa/japonesa, melhores citações de integração e pesquisa na web padrão DDG para as competências do agente.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- В последнем исходном выпуске v1.12.1 добавлен статус встраивания потокового документа, поэтому рабочая область загружает отчеты о ходе выполнения для каждого документа.
- Built-in Добавлена ​​интеграция навыков агента для Gmail, Outlook и Календаря Google.
- Другие улучшения включают поддержку лайтбокса изображений, поддержку генерации PDF на корейском, китайском и японском языках, улучшенную интеграцию цитат и веб-поиск DDG по умолчанию для навыков агентов.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- En son yukarı akış sürümü v1.12.1, akışlı belge yerleştirme durumunu ekler, böylece çalışma alanı belge başına rapor ilerlemesini yükler.
- Built-in Gmail, Outlook ve Google Takvim için temsilci beceri entegrasyonları eklendi.
- Diğer iyileştirmeler arasında resim ışık kutusu desteği, Korece/Çince/Japonca PDF oluşturma desteği, daha iyi entegrasyon alıntıları ve aracı becerileri için DDG varsayılan web araması yer alır.

title: AnythingLLM
